title: polygala amara var. uliginosa
intro: Polygala amara var. uliginosa, also known as Marsh Milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Polygala amara var. uliginosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine for its expectorant and diuretic properties.
